title: roegneria novae-angliae
intro: Roegneria novae-angliae, also known as the New England wildrye or Roegneria, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Roegneria novae-angliae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Roegneria novae-angliae can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
